title: RTL array_index_inout read vs. write (FIRRTL Memory Lowering Bug)

features.name: inout array accessor in procedural blocks
features.description: Code should include an inout array accessor (via sv.array_index_inout or equivalent) duplicated inside both an always_ff and an initial procedural block, where the accessor is used for assignment in each block

extraction_summary.notes: This is primarily an MLIR lowering bug, not a pure SV issue. The extracted feature captures the procedural array element access pattern that triggers the bug when lowering is incorrect.
